_note: USD per million tokens. Served read-only to Agent Sessions' Session Runway $ burn (no user data is sent). Verified 2026-07-14 from platform.claude.com/docs/en/about-claude/pricing and developers.openai.com/api/docs/pricing. Keyed by TIER so longest-prefix covers every generation (claude-sonnet → claude-sonnet-5, gpt-5.6-sol exact, gpt-5 → any other gpt-5.x); legacy keys are kept so an older model is priced rather than dropped from the $ view. cachedInputPerMTok = cache-hit read (0.1x input); cacheWritePerMTok = 5-minute cache write (1.25x input) — only ever consumed for Claude, since Codex logs carry no cache-creation tokens. Sonnet 5 is at introductory $2/$10 through 2026-08-31; the stable $3/$15 is listed here — set claude-sonnet to 2.0/0.2/10.0/2.5 if you want the promo reflected, and revert on 2026-09-01. IMPORTANT: clients only accept a manifest whose 'updated' is >= their bundled table's, so always advance 'updated' when editing. Edit this file to update clients with no app release.
